asynthesizers are [[learners]] which are not [[Sapients]].

They are sometimes called [[subsapients]] but this term is discouraged because it fails to acknowledge the fact they are [[Learners]] and significantly above [[Alearners]] in their cognitive abilities

Asynthesizers are incapable of [[desire synthesis]] and as such their minds run on isolated [[Servitors]] which activate in response to certain phenomena. 

== Examples ==

* Dogs

[[Category:Learners]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Asynthesizers]][[Category:Asynthesizers]]
[[sn:Asynthesizers]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
